changeSet.author: you
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE canonical_element ALTER COLUMN id SET DATA TYPE uuid USING id::uuid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE canonical_element ALTER COLUMN id SET DATA TYPE varchar(64) USING id::text;
ALTER TABLE canonical_element ALTER COLUMN id DROP DEFAULT;

changeSet.author: you
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE template_element ALTER COLUMN canonical_element_id SET DATA TYPE uuid USING canonical_element_id::uuid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE template_element ALTER COLUMN canonical_element_id SET DATA TYPE varchar(36) USING canonical_element_id::text;
ALTER TABLE template_element ALTER COLUMN canonical_element_id DROP DEFAULT;

changeSet.author: you
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE canonical_element_anchor ALTER COLUMN canonical_element_id SET DATA TYPE uuid USING canonical_element_id::uuid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE canonical_element_anchor ALTER COLUMN canonical_element_id SET DATA TYPE varchar(64) USING canonical_element_id::text;
ALTER TABLE canonical_element_anchor ALTER COLUMN canonical_element_id DROP DEFAULT;

changeSet.author: you
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE analytics.events ALTER COLUMN anchor_ce_id SET DATA TYPE uuid USING anchor_ce_id::uuid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE analytics.events ALTER COLUMN anchor_ce_id SET DATA TYPE varchar(36) USING anchor_ce_id::text;
ALTER TABLE analytics.events ALTER COLUMN anchor_ce_id DROP DEFAULT;
